01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.A34F91DB: An aide memoire made by Sir Nicholas Webb to help recall his safe code. It reads: "Diploma. Painting. Game. Model."
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.ADCC3B77: A medical report by Webb's private physician. Appears Sir Nicholas has a heart condition. He wears a smart medical bracelet that monitors his blood pressure and takes a daily dose of ACE inhibitors.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.0EC6E5A5:
Damien Webb's "unofficial" MI6 case file. 
It's heavily redacted but seems to suggest that Damien committed war crimes during his time as a private military contractor. In 2018, he and a small band of mercenaries were arrested during a botched coup d’etat attempt in central Africa, orchestrated by a Dutch mining company. 
Sir Nicholas must have pulled some heavy favours to bury his son’s antics and avoid a scandal that would tarnish the family name.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.323E55C0:
A 2012 psych evaluation of Damien Webb from the Hoffmann clinic in Zürich.  
Regarding: Psychological evaluation and diagnosis:
The patient exhibits many of the standard symptoms of antisocial personality disorder (ASPD); deviance, impulsivity, aggression, recklessness, manipulation and deception, callous and unemotional traits and feelings of contempt. 
The condition was likely triggered by the trauma of his mother's suicide when the patient was eight years old.
The patient vividly recalls finding his mother's lifeless body after having consumed a lethal overdose of prescription painkillers. He reports that his mother was behaving erratically, even threateningly, in the weeks leading up to her suicide, and that she claimed her son was an 'imposter' (suggesting a rare case of undiagnosed Capgras syndrome).
While generally displaying antisocial behavior towards his surroundings, the patient has developed a fixation on his deceased mother, harbouring obsessive and conspiratorial fantasies about the causes of her death, including that his father deliberately gas lit her, triggering a depression and subsequent mental breakdown. These fantasies, however unsubstantiated, have only served to further alienate the patient from his family.
Treatment Plan: long-term psychotherapy to address underlying trauma and integrate identities, combined with medication for occurring symptoms like depression or anxiety.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.9258C8DB: A striking illustration of the famous AI thought experiment known as Roko's Basilisk. The work itself appears to be generated by a Webb Industries AI. The title reads "Basilisk, rendition #4".
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.89B3EACA: A framed Mathematics degree from King's College, London. Sir Nicholas graduated first in class – ahead of not one, but two Nobel laureates.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.D0EA02AA: A framed photo from the inauguration of THEIA Mk 2. Sir Nicholas shaking hands with Foreign secretary Bright who spearheaded the privatization of SIGINT – condemning the double O programme to the dustbin of history.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.F851A9D2: A copy of an early 90s adventure game, written and programmed by one Nicholas Webb. A dystopian, neon-soaked sci-fi adventure titled "Hyperion 9".
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.FF9A290C: A large cat sculpture dominating Sir Nicholas' desk.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.AAA1090B: A scale model of Webb Industries’ Hong Kong office entitled "Site III".
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.F068279B: The Tabula Rasa general purpose android. Webb Industries' next game-changing technology.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.FEC07F04: "Antikythera" by the famous basque artist and sculptor Emilé Gorka. It depicts the world's oldest example of an analogue computer. Its value is indeterminable.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.C942C29B: Webb Industries' newest research site planned to house the company's swarm robotics factory.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.9D671ADD: A picture of Damien Webb with his old PMC, Riptide, along with the Murto twins. An elite mercenary group believed to operate in many of the world's most dangerous hot zones. The note on the back reads "Yemen, 2018".
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.3BF6D786: A family photo of a young Damien with his parents. Written on the back: Nicholas, Lydia and Damien, 2004.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.AF2FC03A: A Hampshire police report on the death of Damien's mother, Lydia Florence Webb in 2004. The cause of death: suicide by prescription painkillers. The worn edges indicate the report has been studied obsessively.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.08EBAA83: An extensive collection of high-end skin and hair products. Worthy of a true groomer.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.2D222AC8: Damien's social calendar. Tonight's gala at the W&A is underlined. Appears he is out-of-office for the next couple of days on a business trip.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.4B404088: A receipt from a Norwegian biomedical company, Saxon Nordic, for some type of chemical compound. Appears to be a highly expensive trial drug.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.AAD99676: A sketch for an upgrade to Damien’s warrior mask.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.D58FF364: A PhD certificate in Crisis Management from Columbia University belonging to one Isola Vale.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.F623ABB8: Blueprints of Webb HQ and surveillance pictures of the perch entrance, the building mainframe and guard patrol patterns.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.F2F0D9BA: An adorable Bernese mountain dog named Humphrey. A stock photo, no doubt.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.7642F0E8:
The cleaning robots have access to every room on the floor, and may be re-directed to a specific location using the control panels situated throughout the floors. 
The door open automatically when the electronic sensors detect an approaching robot. No human assistance required.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.FB053362: An art piece celebrating the many technological breakthroughs by Webb Industries during its long and impactful history. Commissioned in commemoration of the company’s 125th anniversary.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.6747B054: A magazine on modern architecture featuring an article about the Webb Industries building and its daughter offices around the world.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.14828F41:
“Please tell the cleaners not to stand on our brand-new equipment boxes when they clean the vent in the maintenance room. Get a bloody ladder! 
Carmine, IT office.”
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.CC66C72F: This traditional Bordeaux wine has a velvety palate with an oaky aroma on the nose. An elegant, yet not ostentatious choice, at 300 pounds a bottle.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.A3EBCE0A:
“Please repair the keycard reader ASAP!!! 
This door only locks with a key atm. If any classified documents are stolen from the archives, the blame is on you! 
Kenneth.”
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.71E13D74: A layout of the executive floors.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.83A22490:
"MGMT just triggered a code white. I'll try and finish the setup before you get here in the morning. If not, ping me. 
Travis"
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.F35FD62A: A scaled model of Webb Industries’ ground-breaking Gjallarhorn long-range artillery cannon, revealed in 1908.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.E4207601:
“Welcome all. 
Tonight, we celebrate the history of Webb Industries. But merely looking back would be complacent. Personally, I prefer to look ahead. 
For more than a century Webb Industries has pushed for a better, safer future. Through precision and perfection, we've continually reduced risk and minimized damage. 
And yet, I want us to aim higher. 
I believe technology has the power to elevate us above the chaotic fog of our sapient brains and into a more gracious and enlightened future. A future free from human limitation, and safe from human error. 
I have dedicated myself to making sure that every day, that future moves one step closer.”
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.25849E3C:
“Attention all staff. 
After careful consideration, it has been decided that an invitation to join one of the elite dev teams at our R&D facility is a private matter and will not be openly announced at Friday meetings, in the monthly newsletter etc. 
It is up to each employee whether they want to share the happy news with their team or not. This is to prevent toxic inter-departmental rivalry and resentment. 
I appreciate your understanding. 
Jocelyn, UK Head of HR.”
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.2C2B3636:
“Attention all staff.
This is a (not-so)friendly reminder that you are not to discuss classified projects on the tube, in a taxi, at the pub or any other public, semi-public or otherwise non-secure location. Even the smallest breach may cause severe financial harm to the company, our partners and shareholders.
We do not want a repeat of the Edinburgh incident. If in doubt whether to speak, don’t!
Thank you.
Charles Danville, Chief marketing director.”
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.101C2A0D:
“Siobhan, do us a favour and take Cheeseman for a pint later, will you? I found the poor chap sobbing in a cupboard after Finch tore him a new arsehole over a botched lunch order. 
N.B. I know he’s a bit of a twat but he’s one of us now.”
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.9DA4EA57: “I just clocked Isola Vale sneaking out of DW’s office. Think they’re having a fling?”
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.288E6B67: A resume on doctor Selina Tan with a note from Recruitment: "Top candidate to head the WBE & neuromorphic research initiative. Approach with offer!"
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.F2EB91D6:
Attention all senior staff. 
When discussing the Tabula Rasa general purpose robot with your teams, please reiterate that we will not be developing military or law enforcement capabilities. 
Any such initiative would go against our company ethos and hurt our transition in the public mind from defence contractor to consumer tech corporation. Emphasize instead TR's revolutionary potential as caretaker, tutor, paramedic and disaster relief worker. 
You are the ambassadors of the Webb Industries brand, so let's set a positive example. Thank you. 
Charles Danville, Chief Marketing Director.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.AEBC0BD3: A draft of a letter to a genealogist from the London College of Arms. Roger Finch contests the College's conclusion that he does not descend from a Duke.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.4EAF2DEF: A declined application from Blades Club; London's most exclusive private card club, for one Roger Finch.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.77C829D3: A framed graduation certificate from Cambridge Law School.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.F1181600: A draft of a letter to a genealogist from the London College of Arms. Roger Finch contests the College's conclusion that he does not descend from a Duke.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.AE3BC403: A 'wooden spoon' prize from Cambridge, symbolizing that Roger was last in his class.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.0DE0D6EA:
Turn the power back on after cleaning! 
Our CEO has better things to do than play around with fuse boxes. 
Thank you! 
Mitchell, Executive Office Manager.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.7DDEDFF6: In memory of Samuel Webb (1866-1917), the company's founder, who was killed in a German air raid along with his oldest son Bertrand.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.D59B954F:
In memory of Malcolm Webb (1892-1968), the company's second CEO. 
Under his thriving leadership, Webb Industries became synonymous, not only with quality, reliability, and precision, but also restraint and accountability. A scholar and humanitarian, Malcolm believed in a measured response with minimal collateral damage.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.02E7E437: A model of the Horus Mk II low orbit spy satellite. Launched in 1965, it changed the rules and landscape of SIGINT forever.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.2B3A9FFE:
A miniature covert listening device nicknamed the 'Nosy Parker' developed in 1985. 
Originally developed for the SIS, it became an unexpected commercial success, propelling Webb Industries into the ranks of the top ten Defence contractors in the world.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.57A69FBA:
A scale model of the GOLEM autonomous vehicle guidance system. developed in 2009. 
One of newly appointed CEO Nicholas Webb's first big successes, the GOLEM deploys a sophisticated deep learning neural network, utterly ahead of its time.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.4BB5088F: A painting of Sir Nicholas Webb receiving a Knighthood from the late Queen Elizabeth II.
01D2FE0CBD1CB9F7.29CC0FCC:
A tablet inscribed with the Sir Nicholas Webb's core value statement. 
"We are optimistic futurists driven by a desire to reduce human error on a global scale through technology and AI".

01F6FDFCC3CA799A.A4448FE5:
- Niko Murto (NM) intercepts Rhinestone Insurance agent Joseph Locke at a gas station, kills him, and conceals the body in a dumpster.
- NM checks into room 206 at the Grand Carpathian as Locke.
- Tero Murto (TM) enters the hotel disguised as a bellhop. In the parking lot, he runs into the author Arthur Prendergast who asks him to bring his suitcase to his room. TM disposes of the suitcase and is noticed by agent-in-training James Bond (JB) in the parking lot.
- TM enters the backstage area and steals a page from an antique book, thereby learning how to access the secret passage in the dining room.
- TM steals a key to the laundry area where he changes into a maintenance outfit.
- NM summons Mr. Kovac, the hotel chief of security, to his room under the pretense of going over the security procedures for the event. He strangles Kovac and steals his security uniform and Lvl 5 keycard.
- TM goes to room 206, hides Kovac in a cart and disposes of the body in the basement. He steals a chef's uniform.
- NM enters the electrical room with Kovac's keycard. He causes the power surge that takes the security system offline. The millimeter wave scanners shut down, forcing the guards to inspect people and deliveries by hand. 
- JB spots TM from the second floor balcony, dressed as a chef.
- NM proceeds to the back lot, where he poisons an on-duty guard and takes his place at the security gate just as an accomplice pulls up in a catering truck. NM waves the truck through unvetted.
- In the back lot, TM unloads the explosives from the truck onto a food cart and enters through the kitchen. Evading the pursuing JB, he smuggles his deadly cargo through the secret passage in the dining hall and into the sealed-off wine cellar, located directly below tournament hall.
- Agent-in-training Lennox Monroe confronts TM in the cellar and is killed.
- 009 arrives for his meeting with senior agent John Greenway at tournament hall, using himself as bait.
- In the wine cellar, JB confronts and neutralizes TM but is ambushed by a newly arrived NM. The twins make a strategic retreat.
- JB sounds the fire alarm and successfully deactivates the primary device. However, the secondary device detonates, causing a partial cave-in of the roof. Due to JB's timely intervention, the civilian casualties are drastically reduced, but agents-in-training Marcus Singh and Christina Kingsley are killed in the explosion. Agents-in-training Cressida Bright and Alexandra Ronson are severely injured. Senior agent John Greenway and agent-in-training Robert Nash suffer minor injuries. Only JB is left unharmed.
- 009 flees the premises, pursued by JB and a yet unidentified woman, claiming to be Charlotte Roth from French Intelligence.
- JB engages a group of 009's hired mercenaries at a private airfield but fails to apprehend 009 who escapes on a chartered cargo plane. However, JB resourcefully leaves his Q-watch behind, allowing MI6 to track its movement.
01F6FDFCC3CA799A.6BEF29AC: An invitation to the Webb Industries 125th anniversary gala at the W&A in Kensington.
01F6FDFCC3CA799A.783B9032: Today's issue of The Thameside Tattle.
01F6FDFCC3CA799A.32A91AB5: The front page story is about the assumed terrorist bombing of the world chess tournament in Slovakia. Foreign Secretary Bright's daughter, who is among the injured, is recovering at a private clinic in Hampshire.
01F6FDFCC3CA799A.F007005E: Today's issue of The British Standard
01F6FDFCC3CA799A.C7B79D76: An article about political unrest in Slovakia after the chess championship explosion.
01F6FDFCC3CA799A.53B57C71: An issue of The Critical Eye
01F6FDFCC3CA799A.74F9C6A2:
A leading article about the Slovakia incident proposing that the official gas leak narrative is a cover-up and that the explosion was a terrorist act by an elusive power-cabal with ties to the UN, Silicon Valley and the military-industrial complex.
Whitlock and his team strikes again.
01F6FDFCC3CA799A.DA9E2CEF: The order of service from the recruits' funeral. M did a gracious recitation of Requiem by Robert Louis Stevenson.
01F6FDFCC3CA799A.0942C748:
Q-04: Missile pen test #1 - In progress
Q-05: Light-absorbing nanotube coating - In progress
Q-06: Biosensing smart screen test #2 - In progress
Gadget Testing: Laser strap - Certified - Operational
Gadget Testing: Flash mine - Certified - Operational

01AFE843D8688CA8.F4F5AAE3: What do you make of Sir Nicholas Webb?
01AFE843D8688CA8.42A14AB9: What are we telling the public?

01E2BC17EACFFF3A.B6228E41: Aim and shoot and the turret will follow.
01E2BC17EACFFF3A.0FC0F2E9: Use gadgets on the environment to disable Damien's exo-suit.
01E2BC17EACFFF3A.2C6B5B65: Take down Damien's defences through explosions or proximity hacking.
01E2BC17EACFFF3A.1029FBB8: Reach Damien's turret to take control of it.
01E2BC17EACFFF3A.56816623: Hack the alarms to distract Damien.
01E2BC17EACFFF3A.4C0020CF: Damien and the gun turrets are bulletproof.

0166F9DC3CF86CF6.FDD2F157: Where might I find Mr Hernandez?
0166F9DC3CF86CF6.B6410B2A: Where can I find Ellis White?
0166F9DC3CF86CF6.E1932147: Could you show me to the bar?
0166F9DC3CF86CF6.C87594C1: How long are you staying for?
0166F9DC3CF86CF6.73FB3240: Do you know who I am?
0166F9DC3CF86CF6.6E8CE0D9: This is all your father's fault.

0116307CABEF4634.D1B5B748: A tome on ornithology and other fields of interest.
0116307CABEF4634.6C7FDB86: 'Aim here Bond!' A Valentine's gift from Monroe and Cressida.
0116307CABEF4634.B1E90203: A no-nonsense guide on how to tie the 50 plus most practical rope knots.
0116307CABEF4634.CC9A045B: A silver brooch belonging to Bond's late mother.
0116307CABEF4634.110CDDDE:
Cressida's favourite curry house. 
Her and Monroe's go-to dishes are highlighted.
0116307CABEF4634.85C6DDF6: The exact moment Monroe and Cressida's relationship moved beyond platonic.
0116307CABEF4634.71506895:
'YOU'RE A KNOCK OUT!'
Cressida's favourite mug, bought for her by Monroe.
0116307CABEF4634.5620BDA0:
James,
I couldn't face staying in the apartment any longer than I had to, Someone will come by and pick up the rest of my things in a couple of days. There are just too many reminders of him; of everything, to be honest.
I'm getting out of London for a little while. I'm going to stay with Mother at the summer house in Amalfi while I figure out what's next for me.  
I want you to know none of what happened in Slovakia – not one single iota – was your fault. If Monroe were here, he would tell you the same. You saved my life and for that I am forever grateful. Take care of yourself, and please don't be a stranger. I mean that James.
Cressida
0116307CABEF4634.8BB66425: An unfinished card game played before leaving for Slovakia.
0116307CABEF4634.912C8FBB: P _ i s _ n - _ i p U _ b _ _ l l _
0116307CABEF4634.F1703AF0:
'All-night martial arts movie marathon at the Caper'. 
Cressida and Monroe's final date.
0116307CABEF4634.2CE6E375:
Silk cushions. Luxury soaps. Face cream. 
Another of Cressida's mother's 'emergency relief packages'.
0116307CABEF4634.5195E52D: Monroe's trainer collection. There's a pair here for almost every occassion.
0116307CABEF4634.31C95066: A shelf full of non-fiction books covering a wide range of subjects, including behavioural psychology, cryptography and codebreaking, mimetics, negotiation and persuasion, as well as various titles on political science.
0116307CABEF4634.EC5F89E3: 'In case of being followed, dump all traceable devices'.
0116307CABEF4634.CB2F5CD6: 'Write lightly. The blank page beneath can be read.'
0116307CABEF4634.16B98553: 'The greatest vice is that of carelessness. The next greatest vice is that of vanity'.
0116307CABEF4634.ED4DAA60:
A MI6 mnemonic memory game. Ideal for memory improvement, understanding difficult concepts and mastering new learning strategies. 
Simply pick a card, memorise the objects on it, then write down the ones remembered.
0116307CABEF4634.30DB73E5: Bond's own design. Very true to character.
0116307CABEF4634.8D111F2B: Monroe's manual toothbrush and straight razor.
0116307CABEF4634.5087C6AE:
To whom it may concern, 
They're gone because of my mistakes. 
I could have stopped it, but I failed. It should have been me. 
James Bond
0116307CABEF4634.7122BAF0: The login for the tablet is: M00chaLover.
0116307CABEF4634.CCE8D63E:
Shift 1: Mike Keen - Checked in. 
Shift 2: Harry Sykes - Missing or Late. 
Shift 3: Richard Lonsdale - Checked in.
0116307CABEF4634.117E0FBB:
In 1908 Webb Industries introduced the ground-breaking Gjallarhorn long-range artillery cannon. 
As a result of its success on the battlefield the company signed an exclusive contract with His Majesty's Armed Forces.
0116307CABEF4634.6C0D09E3:
Shift 1: Mike Keen 
Shift 2: Harry Sykes
Shift 3: Richard Lonsdale
0116307CABEF4634.D6C45D3E:
Two on-duty guards will be issued with security passes for anyone requiring access on the night. 
I'll have the names closer to the date. 
Director Hamilton
0116307CABEF4634.6B0E31F0:
Absolutely no smoking on the cantina balcony of the gala! 
Director Hamilton
0116307CABEF4634.B698E875: The CCTV room skylight has been connected to the network, which means you can open and close it remotely now.
0116307CABEF4634.CBEBEE2D:
The pipe from the balcony to the rooftop is leaking. Please be extra careful of slippages around it. 
Director Hamilton.
0116307CABEF4634.BD023653:
To Harry Sykes, 
This is a formal warning regarding your repeated lateness. You have been reminded on numerous occasions about the importance of arriving on time, and yet the issue has continued. 
As a member of the security team your role is essential to the smooth running and safety of the Works and Arts museum. Your constant tardiness places undue strain and stress on the rest of the team. 
From here on in, you are expected to report for duty on time. Any further breaches may result in disciplinary action. 
Best wishes, 
Director Hamilton
0116307CABEF4634.00C85A9D:
Team, 
Project Knight has been a long road and nothing short of a herculean effort.
Your persistence, care and complete and utter dedication to keep pushing is what makes the final result stand out.
What we have created is stronger and better than every version that came before, and is a result of your effort as a team. 
Thank you for everything you have put into it. 
Director Hamilton
0116307CABEF4634.DD5E8318:
Hi all, 
With the Webb gala on the horizon, security measures will increase on the night.
There will be additional Webb security staff on-site, access checks and tighter controls around certain areas of the building. 
Please ensure you have your ID on you at all times, and adhere to instructions from our own security personnel, as well as Webb’s. Do not hesitate to reach out to someone if you spot anything unusual during the event. 
These measures have been put in place to ensure everything runs safely and smoothly. 
Many thanks, 
Director Hamilton
0116307CABEF4634.A02D8540:
A cluttered staff desk littered with papers, half-finished to-do lists, security checklists and empty cups of tea and coffee.
Clearly somebody with a serious caffeine dependency is trying, and failing, to stay on top of too many things all at once.
0116307CABEF4634.B5833D73:
Gerry
The Restoration Room door locks are still down!
We need it fixed so we can lock the place up after hours.
Them being open all the time right now is a security risk. It needs to be done before the Webb Gala this week.
Thanks,
Barry
0116307CABEF4634.084951BD:
The time and patience it takes to do something like this – while maintaining cultural significance and aesthetic value – is nothing short of incredible. 
Patience is indeed a virtue. But not right now.
0116307CABEF4634.D5DF8838: The tell-tale signs are subtle, but they're there. It's Tero Murto.
0116307CABEF4634.F8F9A61D:
Under no circumstances is the power on the main door of the museum to be tampered with! 
To ensure this the generator needs to remain powered on at all times so we do not cause any disruption to the building's security systems. 
I'm counting on you, lads. Do not make me look bad! 
Eugene.
0116307CABEF4634.4533CAD3: Radio in the archives. Directly linked to your comms and using an encrypted channel, as requested.
0116307CABEF4634.98A51356:
The left wing of the garden is closed for the next three months. It's being renovated for the Spring event, which we hope will be even better than last year. 
Weekly staff code is: 3256E. 
Please only use when absolutely necessary to avoid disturbing the construction workers. 
Director Hamilton

01E091296168EC02.1DC0C3CE: A discarded wallet belonging to R. Kovac, the hotel Chief of Security. Cash and credit cards are untouched.
01E091296168EC02.B1F3A1FB: An empty calfskin leather keycard holder.
01E091296168EC02.FAFB6769: Scuff marks on the floor from black rubber soles. A torn curtain. These are traces of a fight. Looks like someone was strangled.
01E091296168EC02.5FCF4A40: A discarded wool suit, size XL. Looks like the blond man changed his disguise again.
01E091296168EC02.BB6A2C57: Today's copy of the Bratislava Weekly with the hotel's stamp. The leading story appears to be about the mysterious death of a famous climate scientist in Orlando, Florida.
01E091296168EC02.4E27353F: Hotel information booklet. According to the blurb, the castle is a national heritage site.
01E091296168EC02.A9B6B137:
A written notification from hotel management: 
"Attention all staff. It is strictly forbidden to occupy the exterior ledge - particularly after poker night (you know who you are). This type of reckless behaviour is not only a potential violation of our guests' privacy, but a serious safety hazard. Any further transgression will result in immediate termination. 
Signed R. Kovac, Chief of Security."
01E091296168EC02.38D56298: A broken display case. The shards are on the floor. Must have happened recently.
01E091296168EC02.EE6AFAFE: An antique book written in Slovakian. One of the pages has been torn out.
01E091296168EC02.109E32E3: A worn bellhop outfit. Size XL. Must be the blond man's.
01E091296168EC02.6724E31F: An empty laundry bag, Size XL. The blond man changed disguise. But into what?
01E091296168EC02.91D353B5: A handwritten note. It reads simply: "206".
01E091296168EC02.319DF32C: A door leading to the Staff Entrance. Blocked by a chair.
01E091296168EC02.1CD0E642: A page torn from an antique book. The text is in Slovakian, but it appears to be a set of instructions for a hidden mechanism.
01E091296168EC02.4996251F: An old dial adorned in animal symbols. Some kind of locking mechanism.
01E091296168EC02.D3897AA4: A crest belonging to an ancient knightly order established by the castle's original owner. The chimera features prominently. A hybrid creature from Greek mythology.
01E091296168EC02.543F2380: The blond man must have exited the laundry through the window.
01E091296168EC02.4EBD4CBA: This lock is practically an antique.
01E091296168EC02.6610FDA6: A discarded bellhop hat. Could have been ditched by the blond man.
01E091296168EC02.E2046E30: The 1972 Archambeau Rouge is certainly fine but it pales in comparison to the Mont Arras Sacrimental. Superb!
01E091296168EC02.D9039D40:
Due to increased security during the event, we'll be changing the codes on a daily basis. 
The codes are stored in the managers office behind reception.
01E091296168EC02.F52FC1D8: A sign directing guests to the 2nd floor suites.

014DF8359D8104B3.E1FEB921: Camping gear, military fatigues, combat boots and a rations.
014DF8359D8104B3.39B2D30E: Ammo, tools, tinned foods and bottles of water.

014DF8359D8104B3.7814A5A5: An assortment of ammo for various gun calibres, as well as a variety of grenades including fragmentation, smoke, chemical and stun grenades.

01679BA07B61C09F.D57444BB:
Initiating startup sequence.
Chamber lockdown confirmed.
Initiating countdown.
Explosion triggered. Level 9.
Notes: The armour plating passed with flying colours. There are diagnostics to run on the internal systems, but anyone in the car would be safe. Q
01679BA07B61C09F.C89F3201:
After Bond's latest mission in Vietnam, I've determined that field equipment requires additional stress testing before being issued to an agent. (Why does he break everything!?) 
The Q-Watches will be moved to the stress testing chamber for additional evaluations.
The Q-Pistol has passed first inspection and has been sent to the armoury for further tests.
Additional field equipment is to undergo more thorough evaluation in gadget testing.
01679BA07B61C09F.15267477: Q's favourite whisky tumbler. Baccarat crystal.
01679BA07B61C09F.88619755:
Waters, The leader board's glitching. I beat your score last week.
No need to change the code. Just fix the glitch!
Brooks
01679BA07B61C09F.AC0E5EB9:
Q
Please tell Waters to stop changing the armoury passcode every time he makes it to the top of the target range leader board, or to at least let us know that’s what he’s done?
We’ve asked him, but he won’t listen. Maybe he’ll listen to you.
Thanks.
01679BA07B61C09F.9009C004:
Memo: Set date for upgrade to biometric scanner. 
As noted at the last staff meeting, the current scanner’s calibration means it will also accept copies of an authorised fingerprint, such as a printed scan or a print transferred using sticky tape. Recalibration of the scanner is a P1 task.
Bridget

01679BA07B61C09F.B1523A9F:
The latest prototype of the service pistol performs to expectations, with the iterated designs of the frame, slide, barrel, and magazine achieving the desired improvements in action, handling and accuracy. 
It is scheduled for final stress testing and certification after stress testing of the new Q-Watch is complete.
01679BA07B61C09F.9B6AAAFA:
Use with caution. Can cause a fire when not used correctly.
Check the lock above the door is activated.
Make sure fuel flow is not too high.
Fuel control is located above (use ladder)
01679BA07B61C09F.D82E8CFC:
The protocol needs an update.
It happens far too easily right now and, people can get locked in.
Some equipment stops working entirely, including the fire escape.
The only workaround right now is to trigger what the room considers an emergency.
I don't want to start a fire or destroy the explosion test chamber to get out.
01679BA07B61C09F.65FE3188:
I had closer look at the bike and fire exhaust. 
Previously the fire exhaust was directly tapping into the gas tank.
Not ideal, I've disconnected it for now and will look into a better solution.
Q
01679BA07B61C09F.55034317:
The cube has been showing odd voltages lately.
I saw similar issues with the Valhalla the other day.
Tomorrow I'll compare the two and investigate further.
In the meantime, it is waiting in the storage unit.
Q
01679BA07B61C09F.80FC63C7:
Laser: 
You can rotate the laser freely and along the rail.
Warning: Can break lab equipment.
Do NOT point at the furnace. This could compromise staff safety.
Only use on test items on elevated platforms.
01679BA07B61C09F.F0D48C1E:
Bridget - Critical gadgets field certified. Waiting for next batch to test.
Gary - Equipment requests have been sent off to procurement.
Henry - Q-Watch is field certified. Currently in stress testing, awaiting final sign-off.
Waters - The latest iteration of the service pistol has arrived. Logged and secured in the armoury.
01679BA07B61C09F.F2923247:
Jetpack: Upgrade fuel management system
Drone: Replace batteries with high-capacity models.
Foam: Reinforce container.
Q-Watch: Finalise report. Currently in stress testing.
01679BA07B61C09F.F3505870:
Prepare Q-Watch 2.0 for field certification. Status: stress testing - final stages.
Speaker: upgrade acoustic capacity. It can never be too loud.
Investigate reuse of the phone booth. Research locations in London.
01679BA07B61C09F.D0FE038E:
Important: Update code regularly!
When updating the code: 
It is always a 4-digit number
The code should always be related to test subject itself
Update immediately when a new test subject comes in.
01679BA07B61C09F.199D180B: Door closes automatically on detonation countdown initiation.
01679BA07B61C09F.B9FB5247:
- Following the botched attempt on his life, 009 flees the premises heading for a nearby abandoned airfield, where a cargo plane is ready to take off. But a team of mercenaries deployed by Damien Webb intercept 009 on the tarmac and proceed to extract him on his own getaway plane. When agent-in-training James Bond arrives at the scene, he mistakes 009's captors for his own men.
- In the ensuing gun fight, 009 presumably gets free, overpowers his captors, takes control of the cockpit and proceeds to his original rendezvous point.
- Despite taking elaborate precautions to cover his trail, 009 must have known that THEIA would soon be able to track him. He leaves clues for John Greenway to find before Damien Webb's kill team - somehow piggybacking off of THEIA's intel - track him to his accommodations in Aleph and eliminate him, rigging the crime scene to look like an inside job.
01679BA07B61C09F.1FB7A10E:

Stress Test Chamber: Q-Watch - Certified - Operational
